description: The Footstep Events node takes in the global source of a FootstepEventRelay or SelfFootstepEventRelay component, and returns the values from this user's footstep. The footstep event counts when any proxy on a slot detects the collision and raycast from a user's feet onto that ICollider, as long as that collider does not have the ``No Collision`` setting on, and also does not have the ``Ignore Raycasts`` setting on.

fields.Footstep: Fires when a footstep event happens from a FootstepEventRelay or SelfFootstepEventRelay component.
fields.Side: Returns the side of that footstep.
fields.Position: Returns the position of that footstep.
fields.Rotation: Returns the rotation of that footstep.
fields.ImpactVelocity: Returns the impact velocity of that footstep.
fields.HasLanded: Returns if this footstep has landed.
fields.HitCollider: Returns the collider that this footstep has collided with.
fields.HitTriangleIndex: Returns the particular triangle of where this footstep has collided with.
